tagline: Whisper Tiny — invisible STT infrastructure for auto-fill
description:
Small CT2-quantised speech-to-text model (OpenAI Whisper Tiny via
Systran's faster-whisper build). Aura uses it behind the scenes to
auto-transcribe reference audio for voice-clone models: any model
whose manifest declares `auto_fill: {via: stt}` on an input gets
free transcription. Invisible system component — no UI controls,
no model browser entry, no marketplace surface.
notes: Invisible infrastructure — NOT shown in the model browser, hidden via the `internal: true` flag in catalogue.json. Auto-installed at first launch as a system component (same path as prompt-engine).

Used by api/services/transcription/transcriber.py when any user-facing model declares `auto_fill: {via: stt}` on an input. First consumer is dia-1.6b voice_ref_transcript auto-filling from the uploaded voice_ref clip.
faster-whisper (CTranslate2 backend, MIT) — no torch needed. CPU + INT8 keeps the image small and inference fast for short clips.
Weights baked at build time via WhisperModel('Systran/faster-whisper-tiny', device='cpu', compute_type='int8') — the CT2 files are device-agnostic.
